case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MEI WEI YANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,962.54 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, MEI WEI LIU, LI LI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED 12/1/15, (FEE: $75.00) SERVED DEC-01-0015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, LI LI

STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, LI LI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT LI LI LIU PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MEI WEI YANG, WHO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES ACTION AS TO DEFENDANT MEI WEI YANG WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MEI WEI YANG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, LI LI $1,962.54 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,037.54, PLAINTIFF DISMISSES ACTION AS TO DEFENDANT MEI WEI YANG WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF - UNABLE TO FORWARD
